data.title: BriaCell Therapeutics Reports Rising Losses and Funding Pressure
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An announcement from BriaCell Therapeutics ( (TSE:BCT) ) is now available.

On March 31, 2026, BriaPro Therapeutics filed unaudited condensed interim consolidated financial statements and management’s discussion and analysis for the three- and six-month periods ended January 31, 2026 with securities regulators in British Columbia and Alberta, covering activity in 2025 and 2026. The filings show a small asset base of about $176,890 against current and non-current liabilities totaling roughly $1.8 million, a shareholders’ deficit exceeding $1.6 million, and rising research and development costs that drove comprehensive losses of $227,493 for the quarter and $472,231 for the six months, signaling ongoing funding needs and balance-sheet pressure for stakeholders.

The interim results highlight that BriaPro’s cash position is minimal, its deficit has widened from $1.15 million in July 2025 to $1.62 million by January 31, 2026, and amounts due to related parties have increased to more than $1.6 million. With R&D spending more than doubling year over year and a warrant liability that adds further complexity to the capital structure, the company’s dependence on external financing and related-party support remains a key risk factor for investors and creditors.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:BCT) stock is a Hold with a C$5.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on BriaCell Therapeutics stock, see the TSE:BCT Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on BCT Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, BCT is a Neutral.

The score is driven primarily by weak financial performance: no revenue, widening losses, and substantial cash burn that increases funding risk. Technicals add modest pressure given the stock remains below key longer-term moving averages with negative MACD, while valuation offers limited support due to negative earnings and no indicated dividend.

To see Spark’s full report on BCT stock, click here.

More about BriaCell Therapeutics

BriaCell Therapeutics Corp., through its subsidiary BriaPro Therapeutics Corp., operates in the biopharmaceutical sector, focusing on research and development activities that are typical of early-stage life sciences companies. The business remains in a development phase, funded largely through related-party support and equity-linked instruments, and reports under International Financial Reporting Standards in the U.S. dollar functional currency.

Average Trading Volume: 28,991

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: C$40.89M

For an in-depth examination of BCT stock, go to TipRanks’ Overview page.

data.title: Ciena Shareholders Back Board, Auditor and Executive Pay
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Ciena ( (CIEN) ) has provided an update.

Ciena Corporation reported the results of its 2026 annual meeting of stockholders held on March 26, 2026, where shareholders elected Joanne B. Olsen, Mary G. Puma, and CEO Gary B. Smith as Class II directors to serve three-year terms ending at the 2029 annual meeting. The director slate received majority support, reinforcing the existing board composition and leadership continuity.

Shareholders also ratified the appointment of PricewaterhouseCoopers LLP as Ciena’s independent registered public accounting firm for fiscal 2026 and approved, on an advisory basis, the compensation of the company’s named executive officers. The strong backing for both the auditor ratification and executive pay package signals broad investor support for Ciena’s governance, financial oversight, and executive leadership structure.

The most recent analyst rating on (CIEN) stock is a Buy with a $483.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Ciena stock, see the CIEN Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on CIEN Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, CIEN is a Outperform.

The score is driven primarily by strong financial momentum (robust cash generation, improving profitability, and low current leverage) and a constructive technical uptrend, reinforced by a bullish earnings call with raised guidance and expanding backlog. Offsetting these positives are a demanding valuation (high P/E), signs of stretched momentum, and operational risks from supply constraints, component repricing, and customer/timing concentration.

To see Spark’s full report on CIEN stock, click here.

More about Ciena

Ciena Corporation operates in the telecommunications and networking equipment industry, providing optical networking systems, software, and services that support high-capacity communications infrastructure for carriers, cloud providers, and large enterprise customers. The company focuses on enabling advanced broadband and data transport networks globally, competing in a market driven by bandwidth demand and network modernization.

Average Trading Volume: 3,475,448

data.title: Pozzi Milano Posts Solid 2025 Results in First Year of Full Group Consolidation
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Pozzi Milano S.P.A. ( (IT:POZ) ) has shared an announcement.

Pozzi Milano approved its first full-year consolidated financial statements for 2025, reporting revenues of €25.9 million, value of production of €26.8 million, EBITDA of €3 million with an 11.2% margin, EBIT of €2.5 million, and net profit of €1.5 million. Net financial debt was contained at €0.2 million and shareholders’ equity reached €10.8 million, underscoring a solid capital structure.

Management said 2025 marked the transition from a construction to an execution phase, with integration of recent acquisitions driving operational and commercial synergies. International sales accounted for about 59% of consolidated revenues and 66% at the parent company level, confirming foreign markets as a key growth engine despite a generally weak sector backdrop.

The consolidation perimeter now includes Pozzi Milano, Pozzi Brand Diffusion, Mascagni Casa, and Venditio, making 2025 the first year of published group consolidated data. The company reported that disciplined working-capital management and a shift from short-term to medium-long term financing improved liquidity and enabled reabsorption of debt tied to investments.

For the parent company alone, revenues rose 8.3% year on year to €21.5 million, supported by a diversified product offering and agile commercial strategy. Management emphasized that these results validate Pozzi Milano’s internationalization strategy and expanded brand portfolio as it seeks balanced, long-term growth in a challenging market environment.

The most recent analyst rating on (IT:POZ) stock is a Buy with a EUR1.25 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Pozzi Milano S.P.A. stock, see the IT:POZ Stock Forecast page.

More about Pozzi Milano S.P.A.

Pozzi Milano S.p.A., listed on Euronext Growth Milan, operates in the tableware fashion sector and promotes Italian lifestyle products worldwide. The group owns the EasyLife and Mascagni Casa brands and, via subsidiary Pozzi Brand Diffusion, the Pozzi and Castello Pozzi brands, with a strong focus on international markets and Western Europe in particular.

Average Trading Volume: 20,125

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: €18.12M

For a thorough assessment of POZ stock, go to TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.description:

Shadowfax Technologies Limited ( (IN:SHADOWFAX) ) has issued an update.

Shadowfax Technologies has allotted 944,886 equity shares with a face value of Rs. 10 each to eligible employees and ESOP holders who exercised options under its 2016 Employee Stock Option Plan. The move modestly increases the company’s issued, subscribed and paid-up share capital, signalling ongoing use of equity-linked compensation to deepen employee ownership and potentially better align staff interests with long-term shareholder value.

Following this allotment, the total equity share capital has risen from Rs. 5,81,32,66,190 to Rs. 5,82,27,15,050, with the number of outstanding shares climbing from 58,13,26,619 to 58,22,71,505. While the issuance results in minor dilution for existing shareholders, it underscores the company’s commitment to employee incentives, a common practice among high-growth, tech-driven firms aiming to strengthen retention and engagement in a dynamic market.

More about Shadowfax Technologies Limited

Shadowfax Technologies Limited operates in the technology and logistics sector, providing tech-enabled delivery and related services across India. The company is listed on both the National Stock Exchange of India and BSE, and uses equity-based incentives such as employee stock option plans to attract and retain talent in a competitive market.

data.title: DIC to Exit TAIYO Holdings Alliance in KKR-Backed Take-Private Deal
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

DIC ( (JP:4631) ) has issued an update.

DIC Corporation has agreed to a transaction framework under which KKR-backed KJ005 Co., Ltd. will launch a tender offer to take TAIYO HOLDINGS CO., LTD. private, while DIC, an existing equity-method investor, will not tender its shares but will instead have them repurchased later by the target. Once the deal is completed, TAIYO Holdings will be delisted, cease to be an equity-method affiliate of DIC, and DIC’s capital and business alliance with the company, originally aimed at electronics-sector synergies, will be formally terminated.

DIC said shifting market conditions in electronics and TAIYO Holdings’ pivot toward medical and pharmaceutical businesses have constrained further synergy, and that continuing to commit capital there would not best support its own medium- to long-term value. The company concluded that the KKR-led transaction enhances TAIYO Holdings’ corporate value while offering an economically rational exit for DIC and its shareholders, though both parties plan to maintain a stable commercial relationship after the alliance ends.

The most recent analyst rating on (JP:4631) stock is a Buy with a Yen4132.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on DIC stock, see the JP:4631 Stock Forecast page.

More about DIC

DIC Corporation is a Japanese materials manufacturer best known for printing inks, coatings, polymers and related functional materials, with a strategic focus on electronics and smart living applications. The company allocates capital to businesses expected to generate swift and reliable profits and routinely reviews its portfolio for alignment with this strategy and long-term value creation.

Average Trading Volume: 655,249

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: Yen347.7B

For a thorough assessment of 4631 stock, go to TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Bespoke Extracts Delays Annual 10-K Filing
data.description:
Bespoke Extracts ( (BSPK) ) has released a notification of late filing.

End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Bespoke Extracts, Inc. has filed a Form 12b-25 to notify investors of a delay in submitting its Form 10-K (Yearly Report) for the financial year ended December 31, 2025. The filing concerns the company’s annual report and confirms that all other required periodic reports over the past 12 months have been filed on time.

The company attributes the delay primarily to the additional time needed to complete the compilation, review, and finalization of its financial statements and related disclosures for the Form 10-K (Yearly Report). Management cites ongoing coordination with its independent registered public accounting firm and internal reviews by both management and the audit committee as key factors.

Bespoke Extracts indicates that these procedures imposed time constraints that could not be resolved without unreasonable effort or expense. However, it emphasizes that the delay is procedural rather than the result of a disclosed control failure or a change in auditors, and that work on the report is actively underway.

The company states that it expects to file its delayed Form 10-K (Yearly Report) no later than fifteen calendar days after the original filing deadline. This timeline aligns with the extension allowed under SEC Rule 12b-25 for late annual reports, suggesting the company aims to remain within the grace period and avoid falling out of reporting compliance.

From a financial perspective, Bespoke Extracts discloses that revenue for the year ended December 31, 2025, is estimated to have grown to approximately $1,501,000 from $1,117,452 in 2024. At the same time, the company is unable to provide a reasonable estimate of its net loss for 2025, highlighting some uncertainty around bottom-line performance.

The lack of a net loss estimate means investors should treat these disclosures as forward-looking and subject to change once the audited Form 10-K (Yearly Report) is filed. The revenue increase is positive on its face, but the final report will be crucial to understanding margins, expenses, and overall financial health.

In terms of next steps, Bespoke Extracts underscores that its management and audit committee are continuing their internal reviews while working closely with the independent auditor to finalize the accounts. The notification is signed on behalf of the company by Chief Executive Officer Michael Feinsod, dated March 31, 2026, signaling executive-level responsibility for the delay and the commitment to complete the filing promptly.

More about Bespoke Extracts

Bespoke Extracts, Inc. is a U.S.-based company operating in the consumer products space, producing and selling specialty extract-based products. The company is publicly traded and files regular reports with the Securities and Exchange Commission as an Exchange Act registrant. Its principal executive office is located in Aurora, Colorado.

Average Trading Volume: 7,297

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: $2.48M

See more insights into BSPK stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: MediXall Group Delays Annual SEC Filing
data.description:
MediXall Group ( (MDXL) ) has released a notification of late filing.

End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

MediXall Group, Inc. has filed a Form 12b-25 to notify investors that it will be late in submitting its Form 10-K (Yearly Report) for the financial year ended December 31, 2025. The delayed filing concerns the company’s annual report with the U.S. securities regulator.

The company cites difficulty in obtaining certain financial and other information needed to fully and accurately complete the Form 10-K (Yearly Report) within the normal deadline. Management states that providing this information on time would have required unreasonable effort or expense, but does not point to any auditor change, internal control failure, or special committee review.

MediXall Group indicates that it expects to file the overdue Form 10-K (Yearly Report) within the 15-day extension period allowed under the Form 12b-25 rules. The company also notes that it is working on its missing Form 10-Q (Quarter Report) filings for the quarters ended March 31, June 30, and September 30, 2025.

The company confirms that it does not anticipate any significant change in its results of operations compared with the prior fiscal year in the earnings statements that will appear in the delayed Form 10-K (Yearly Report). As with all such notices, these expectations are forward-looking and could differ from the final audited numbers once the reports are completed.

MediXall Group says it is actively preparing the outstanding annual and quarterly reports to bring its SEC filings up to date and return to full compliance. The notification is signed on behalf of the company by Chief Financial Officer Travis Jackson, dated March 31, 2026, underscoring management’s responsibility for the timing and accuracy of the filings.

More about MediXall Group

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

data.title: Global Power Solutions Unveils 1,000 MW Hydrogen-Based Decentralized Power Push
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Minaean SP Construction ( (TSE:PWER) ) has issued an update.

Global Power Solutions Corp. has launched a Decentralized Power Development Initiative aimed at identifying and evaluating opportunities to deploy modular hydrogen-powered energy infrastructure across North America. The initiative leverages licensed hydrogen-based system architecture combined with off-the-shelf technologies to create scalable, dispatchable power solutions that integrate on-site hydrogen production with power generation.

If fully realized, the initiative could support a development pipeline representing up to roughly 1,000 megawatts of distributed power capacity over time, targeting sectors such as data centres and AI infrastructure, remote communities, industrial and resource operations, and mission-critical or defense-aligned applications. Global plans to structure projects through special purpose entities, pursue long-term power purchase agreements to underpin recurring revenues, and advance from pilot deployments to larger commercial installations, signaling a strategic shift toward becoming a meaningful player in decentralized clean energy.

data.title: Argentina Lithium Hires Red Cloud to Boost Market Visibility
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest update is out from Argentina Lithium & Energy ( (TSE:LIT) ).

Argentina Lithium & Energy Corp. has engaged Red Cloud Financial Services Inc. under a six-month services agreement to provide media and marketing advisory support aimed at boosting the company’s visibility in the mining and investment community. Red Cloud, an IIROC-regulated dealer specializing in mining-sector financial services, will deliver promotional activities such as introductions to publishers, social media outreach, and interviews, for a total fee of $60,000 paid in monthly installments.

The agreement, which can be renewed monthly after the initial term, is structured as a cash-only engagement with no performance-based metrics, equity compensation, or ownership ties between Red Cloud and Argentina Lithium. By formalizing this investor-focused marketing push, the company is seeking to strengthen market awareness of its Argentine lithium assets and strategic positioning in the battery supply chain, potentially enhancing its profile with both industry partners and capital markets participants.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:LIT) stock is a Hold with a C$0.14 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Argentina Lithium & Energy stock, see the TSE:LIT Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on LIT Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, LIT is a Neutral.

The score is primarily held down by weak financial performance (pre-revenue, ongoing losses, and cash burn with reliance on financing), partially offset by a relatively low-leverage balance sheet and some improvement in recent loss and cash outflow trends. Technicals are mixed but lean cautious due to the price trading below key short-term averages. Valuation is constrained by negative earnings and lack of dividend support.

To see Spark’s full report on LIT stock, click here.

More about Argentina Lithium & Energy

Argentina Lithium & Energy Corp. is a mining exploration company focused on acquiring and advancing high-quality lithium projects in Argentina to supply the growing global battery sector. Supported by a strategic investment from Peugeot Citroen Argentina, a Stellantis subsidiary, the company is developing four key projects spanning more than 67,000 hectares in the country’s Lithium Triangle, leveraging a management team with extensive resource-sector experience and backing from the pioneering Grosso Group.
